notes: Two-leg EURUSD/EURGBP market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar and has negative DEV and OOS Sharpe. It is the next unbuilt rank-22 tail pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749/12751/12756/12758/12760/12762/12764/12765/12766/12768 baskets.
Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget. The EA trades EURUSD/EURGBP and selects GBPUSD conversion history for the EURGBP leg.
